channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [CHCL] Pradeep Kumar Jain Acquires 47.5 Lakh Shares of Cian Healthcare Ltd via Allotment
item.description:
Pradeep Kumar Jain has acquired 47,50,000 fully paid-up equity shares of Cian Healthcare Ltd, amounting to INR 4,75,00,000, via allotment in the Board Meeting dated March 16, 2026. This acquisition is pursuant to the resolution plan approved by the Hon'ble National Company Law Tribunal, Mumbai Bench. The acquisition falls under the exemption provided in Regulation 10(1)(da) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

  • Pradeep Kumar Jain acquires 47.5 lakh shares of Cian Healthcare Ltd.
  • The acquisition is worth INR 4,75,00,000.
  • The shares were acquired via allotment in the Board Meeting dated March 16, 2026.
  • The acquisition is pursuant to the resolution plan approved by the Hon'ble National Company Law Tribunal.
  • The acquisition falls under the exemption provided in Regulation 10(1)(da) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Cian Healthcare Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [SOTL] Siddharth G. Mehra Acquires 0.02% Shares in Savita Oil Technologies Ltd
item.description:
Siddharth G. Mehra, a Promoter & Whole-time Director of Savita Oil Technologies Ltd, has acquired 0.02% shares of the company. The acquisition was made on 17th March, 2026 through the open market. Before the acquisition, Mr. Mehra held 0.11% shares of the company. After the acquisition, his holding increased to 0.13%. The total equity share capital and total voting capital of the company remained the same at Rs.13,71,20,830 before and after the acquisition.

  • Siddharth G. Mehra, a Promoter & Whole-time Director of Savita Oil Technologies Ltd, has acquired 0.02% shares of the company.
  • The acquisition was made on 17th March, 2026 through the open market.
  • Before the acquisition, Mr. Mehra held 0.11% shares of the company.
  • After the acquisition, his holding increased to 0.13%.
  • The total equity share capital and total voting capital of the company remained the same at Rs.13,71,20,830 before and after the acquisition.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SAVITA OIL TECHNOLOGIES LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [ZYDUSLIFE] Zydus Lifesciences and Torrent Pharma to Co-market Innovative Semaglutide Injection in India
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Zydus Lifesciences Limited and Torrent Pharmaceuticals Limited have entered into a Licensing and Supply Agreement to co-market Semaglutide Injection in the Indian market. The agreement allows Zydus to manufacture and supply the product, while Torrent Pharma will co-market it under its brand name SEMBOLIC™. Zydus will market the product under its brand SEMAGLYN™, MASHEMA™ and ALTERME™. The formulation is designed to enhance patient convenience, improve treatment adherence, and support better long-term compliance. The partnership aims to improve patient access to advanced GLP-1 therapies for metabolic disorders.

  • Zydus and Torrent Pharma sign licensing agreement to co-market Semaglutide Injection in India
  • Zydus to manufacture and supply the product, Torrent Pharma to co-market it under its brand SEMBOLIC™
  • Zydus to market the product under its brand SEMAGLYN™, MASHEMA™ and ALTERME™
  • Formulation designed to enhance patient convenience, improve treatment adherence, and support better long-term compliance
  • Partnership aims to improve patient access to advanced GLP-1 therapies for metabolic disorders

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Zydus Lifesciences Ltd | Category: Joint Ventures

item.title: [SMEL] Raj Kotia Acquires 47.89% Shares in Sungold Media and Entertainment Ltd Through Open Market Purchase
item.description:
🔥 Trending

According to a disclosure made under Regulation 29(1) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, Raj Kotia, a promoter of Sungold Media and Entertainment Ltd, has acquired 47.89% shares of the company. The acquisition was made through open market purchase. The total equity share capital of the company is Rs. 11,00,00,000/- divided into 1,10,00,000 Equity Shares of Rs. 10/- each, both before and after the acquisition.

  • Raj Kotia, a promoter of Sungold Media and Entertainment Ltd, has acquired 47.89% shares of the company
  • The acquisition was made through open market purchase
  • The total equity share capital of the company is Rs. 11,00,00,000/- divided into 1,10,00,000 Equity Shares of Rs. 10/- each, both before and after the acquisition

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sungold Media and Entertainment Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [MILEFUR] Milestone Furniture's Half-Yearly Unaudited Financial Results for September 2023 Approved in Board Meeting
item.description:
Milestone Furniture Ltd. announced the approval of its un-audited financial results for the half-year ended 30th September, 2023 in a board meeting. The meeting was held at the company's registered office in Mumbai on 18th March, 2026. The board also approved the Limited Review Report on the Financial Results Standalone for the same period. The company is not required to submit 'Disclosure of the Related Party Transactions' as per Regulation 23(9) of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. The financial results have been prepared in accordance with Indian Accounting Standards and are available on the company's website and the website of the stock exchange.

  • Approval of un-audited financial results for the half-year ended 30th September, 2023
  • Approval of Limited Review Report on the Financial Results Standalone for the same period
  • Company not required to submit 'Disclosure of the Related Party Transactions' as per Regulation 23(9) of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
  • Financial results prepared in accordance with Indian Accounting Standards

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Milestone Furniture Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [DHAMPURE] Dhampure Specialty Sugars Ltd. Concludes EGM with Positive Responses
item.description:
Dhampure Specialty Sugars Ltd. held its Extra-Ordinary General Meeting (EGM) on 18th March, 2026 at its registered office in Uttar Pradesh. The meeting was chaired by Sorabh Gupta, Chairman & Managing Director, and attended by several other directors and members. The meeting commenced with a quorum of 32 members and concluded at 2:00 P.M. IST. The members present voted on the issuance of Warrant Convertible into Equity Shares on a preferential basis to the Promoter and Promoter Group. The scrutinizer will count the votes and submit a report within 2 working days from the conclusion of the meeting. The results will be declared by the Company within the same time frame and displayed on the Company’s, NSDL, and BSE websites.

  • Dhampure Specialty Sugars Ltd. held its EGM on 18th March, 2026
  • The meeting was chaired by Sorabh Gupta, Chairman & Managing Director
  • Members voted on the issuance of Warrant Convertible into Equity Shares on a preferential basis to the Promoter and Promoter Group
  • The scrutinizer will submit a vote count report within 2 working days
  • The results will be declared and displayed on the Company’s, NSDL, and BSE websites

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DHAMPURE SPECIALITY SUGARS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [IOLCP] NCVI Enterprises Acquires 0.24% Stake in IOL Chemicals & Pharmaceuticals Ltd
item.description:
NCVI Enterprises Ltd, along with Varinder Gupta, Varinder Gupta (HUF), Mayadevi Polycot Limited, and NM Merchantiles Limited, have acquired 7,00,000 equity shares of IOL Chemicals & Pharmaceuticals Ltd. This represents 0.24% of the total diluted share/voting capital of the company. The acquisition was made through the open market.

  • NCVI Enterprises Ltd acquires 0.24% stake in IOL Chemicals & Pharmaceuticals Ltd
  • The acquisition was made through the open market
  • 7,00,000 equity shares were acquired
  • Varinder Gupta, Varinder Gupta (HUF), Mayadevi Polycot Limited, and NM Merchantiles Limited also participated in the acquisition

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: IOL CHEMICALS & PHARMACEUTICALS LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [DWARKESH] Gautam Morarka Acquires Shares in Dwarikesh Sugar Industries Ltd Worth INR 28183109
item.description:
According to a disclosure made under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, Gautam Radheshyam Morarka has acquired shares in Dwarikesh Sugar Industries Limited. The total value of the shares acquired is INR 28183109. The acquisition took place on the BSE Ltd. and National Stock Exchange of India Limited. The total equity share capital of the company remains the same before and after the acquisition, i.e., INR 185301470. The total voting capital of the company also remains the same before and after the acquisition. The shares were acquired through an encumbrance. The securities acquired have a redemption date of 17.03.2026.

  • Gautam Morarka acquires shares worth INR 28183109 in Dwarikesh Sugar Industries Ltd.
  • The acquisition took place on BSE Ltd. and National Stock Exchange of India Limited.
  • The total equity and voting capital of the company remains the same before and after the acquisition.
  • The shares were acquired through an encumbrance.
  • The securities acquired have a redemption date of 17.03.2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DWARIKESH SUGAR INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [APARINDS] Apar Industries to Invest Additional USD 5 mio in Wholly Owned Subsidiary and Up to INR 10.76 Crores in Associate Company for Wind and Solar Hybrid Power Generation
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Apar Industries Ltd has approved additional investment in its Wholly Owned Subsidiary, APAR USA LLC, by making further capital contribution of an amount not exceeding USD 5 mio. The company also proposed Shareholders’ Agreement and Energy Supply Agreement and other relevant agreements for availing another wind and solar hybrid power generation facilities with additional investment up to INR 10.76 crores in its Associate Company, Clean Max Rudra Private Limited. This investment is aimed at expanding the business needs of its Product lines viz., conductors and cables. The fund infusion is proposed to be made in the current FY 2025-26 or in the following Financial Year, in single / multiple tranche/s. Apar Industries will hold 26% stake in the SPV and Promoter-shareholders will hold 74% in the SPV on fully diluted basis.

  • Additional investment of USD 5 mio in Wholly Owned Subsidiary, APAR USA LLC
  • Proposed Shareholders’ Agreement and Energy Supply Agreement with Clean Max Rudra Private Limited
  • Investment up to INR 10.76 crores for wind and solar hybrid power generation
  • Apar Industries to hold 26% stake in the Special Purpose Vehicle
  • Promoter-shareholders to hold 74% stake in the Special Purpose Vehicle

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: APAR INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [FDC] FDC Ltd Appoints CA Kishore Saletore as Additional Independent Director
item.description:
FDC Limited, manufacturers and exporters of foods, drugs, and chemicals, has announced the cessation of the second term of CA Uday Kumar Gurkar as an Independent Director, effective at the close of business hours on March 31, 2026. The Board has approved the appointment of CA Kishore Saletore as an Additional Independent Director for a term of 5 years, subject to the approval of the Members of the Company. The appointment will take effect from April 01, 2026, and will continue until March 31, 2031. The Board has also re-constituted the Audit Committee, Nomination & Remuneration Committee, and Corporate Social Responsibility Committee.

  • FDC Ltd announces the cessation of CA Uday Kumar Gurkar as an Independent Director.
  • CA Kishore Saletore appointed as an Additional Independent Director for a term of 5 years.
  • The appointment of CA Kishore Saletore is subject to the approval of the Members of the Company.
  • The new term will commence from April 01, 2026, and will continue until March 31, 2031.
  • The Board has re-constituted the Audit Committee, Nomination & Remuneration Committee, and Corporate Social Responsibility Committee.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: FDC LTD. | Category: Management Change
